  1. Home
  2. Labels
  3. Custom Roll Labels & Custom Sticker Rolls

Custom Roll Labels

The Perfect Solution for Branding and Packaging

 

Whether you’re a business owner looking to elevate your product packaging or someone planning a personal project, custom roll labels are an affordable and versatile solution. At Decals.com, we offer premium roll labels that stick securely to smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, plastic, metal, and cardboard. Perfect for bottles, jars, boxes, and more, our labels help create a polished, professional look that stands out from the competition.

With a wide range of materials, finishes, and shapes to choose from, we make it easy to design labels that fit your exact needs. Plus, our premium options like Waterproof Roll Labels and Paper Roll Labels provide tailored solutions for industries like food, beverages, and retail packaging.

Custom Clear Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product
Custom Paper Roll Labels
View Product
Custom White Waterproof Roll Labels
View Product

More About Custom Roll Labels

Our roll labels are available in durable BOPP Roll Labels and economical Best Buy Roll Labels, both designed to meet your unique needs:

Waterproof Roll Labels: Made with biaxially oriented polypropylene (BOPP), these labels are ultra-durable, waterproof, and resistant to oils, chemicals, and food acids. Ideal for food and beverage products, waterproof labels are available in clear and white finishes for a sleek and professional appearance.

Paper Roll Labels: For quick and cost-effective labeling, Paper Roll Labels are a smart choice. Available in 4 popular shapes, these labels balance affordability and quality. Perfect for short-term or high-volume applications, they’re a go-to for retail, shipping, or basic product labeling needs.

Our roll labels come in four popular shapes: circle, square, rectangle, and oval. Choose between gloss or matte finishes to match your design aesthetic.

Customer Reviews ... Reviews

★★★★★

Don't take our word for it! See what others are saying.

See Our Reviews More Reviews

Why Choose Decals.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Made in the USA

All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

 

Fast Turnaround

Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

Track Your Order

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

Product Information

What are the benefits of Waterproof Roll Labels?

Waterproof Roll Labels are waterproof, durable, and resistant to most oils, chemicals, and food acids. Their synthetic material is non-toxic, making them ideal for food and beverage applications. They also offer clear, white, or metallic finishes for maximum design flexibility.

Why choose Paper Roll Labels?

Best Buy Roll Labels are perfect for economical, quick-turnaround projects. Available in 20 shapes and 11 materials, these labels are a great option for retail, product packaging, or temporary labeling needs.

What surfaces can roll labels adhere to?

Our labels stick to smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, plastic, metal, aluminum, and cardboard, making them versatile for a wide range of uses.

Are roll labels waterproof?

Yes, but only certain materials. We recommend our waterproof roll labels instead of paper roll labels for added moisture resistance.

What shapes and sizes do you offer?

We offerfour standard shapes: circle, square, rectangle, oval, and kiss-cut. Sizes vary depending on material and shape. For assistance, contact a member of our customer service team.

Can I customize my label design?

Absolutely! Use our online design tool to upload your logo, artwork, or design. We also provide free artwork proofs to ensure your labels are printed exactly as you envision.

What finishes are available?

Choose between glossy for a vibrant look or matte for a subtle, professional finish. Both options are available on most materials.

Order Custom Roll Labels

data.metaDescription: Brand your products with custom printed roll labels from Decals.com! Available in matte or gloss paper & vinyl label materials. Custom sizes available.
